title: Fix intermittent production scoreboard failures (DB connection timeout)
details: The public live scoreboard intermittently failed to load in production ("This page couldn't load"). The MySQL/MariaDB driver's default 1s connect timeout was too tight for Vercel serverless connecting to the cross-region database, so transient network jitter surfaced as socket-timeout 500s. Raised connectTimeout to 10s and acquireTimeout to 15s (both env-tunable), added an auto-retrying error boundary to the scoreboard, and made the leaderboard API return a soft 503 (keeping the last-good board) instead of a 500 on a momentary DB blip.

title: Accept all 5-year age-group BIBs, not just masters (35+)
details: The BIB age-band validator was hard-coded to masters bands (age ≥ 35), so BIBs for younger groups (20-24, 25-29, 30-34, ...) were flagged "invalid" and blocked the event from saving. Lowered the floor to 10 so any valid 5-year band is accepted, in both the event-form check and the report age-group filter.

title: Guard the moderator "start round" action when officials are missing
details: The Start button is now disabled until a head judge, judge and lap-time keeper are assigned, with a clear note of which roles are still missing — instead of throwing an opaque system error on click. startRound now returns a structured result.

title: Hide the "manage events" shortcut on the dashboard from admins without events access
details: On the admin home page, the events shortcut is shown only to admins who can actually open the events hub (events / moderator / reports permission), instead of to everyone. The create-event button on the events page itself remains gated by the events:create permission.

title: Hide root-admin activity from non-root admins
details: On /admin/activity, non-root admins no longer see activity-log entries performed by a root admin. The filter is applied to both the rows and the total/pagination count.

title: Add a changelog table to the About page (Root Admin only)
details: Logs notable changes after v1.0.0, read from the project's CHANGELOG.json file.

title: Reduce Vercel Active CPU for the live scoreboard
details: Switch the public scoreboard to a CDN-cached JSON poll every 5s instead of router.refresh() every 500ms (eliminating full server re-renders); narrow the middleware matcher to gated routes only; throttle the official cookie re-sign; add a 5-minute trust window to the auth JWT callback; widen official-workspace polling to 2-2.5s.

title: Refresh all docs/ to match the current implementation
details: Rewrote 59 files from the old "UI prototype (mock)" framing to the real system: Prisma backend, Server Actions + revalidate, CDN-cached scoreboard, auth/session and secret-code join; removed the nonexistent TIMEKEEPER role/route.
